name: XM1014 | 天空守卫
descriptionEn: The XM1014 is a powerful fully automatic shotgun that justifies its heftier price tag with the ability to paint a room with lead fast. It has been painted using a combination of subtly patterned hydrographics and dry-transfer decals of wings. Sometimes the wings of an angel don't mean salvation
descriptionZh: XM1014 是一把强大的全自动霰弹枪，其高昂的价格赋予了它高射速和室内清剿的能力。 这把武器将精致的图案花纹和翅膀风格的干式转印贴花结合起来，然后进行了涂装。 有时天使的翅膀并不意味着救赎
